headline: Uber Expands Autonomous And Air Taxi Services As Valuation Signals Upside
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has launched Uber Autonomous Solutions to support commercial use of autonomous vehicles across its platform. The company is preparing to introduce Uber Air, with Joby electric air taxis set to operate in Dubai and other planned global cities through the Uber app. These moves extend Uber's app from human drivers only to a mix of autonomous cars and air taxis for urban trips. Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) built its business around ride hailing, food delivery and...

headline: Jim Cramer on Uber: “I Think This Is a Company That’s Taking Over the World”
summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer talked about. During the episode, a caller highlighted the stock’s decline, and Cramer replied: I want you to stay in Uber.
